_about: Fleet design tokens — the $10M craft rules as concrete values. The shared, brand-agnostic foundation every OTCHealth/InnerScope app implements. Per-app brand overrides ONLY the palette + fonts; the scale/targets/motion/patterns are fleet-wide and non-negotiable. This is the seed for the eventual @otchealth/ui package. Source: app-kit/AI-AGENT-APP-BUILDING-BIBLE.md Part 2.

typography._rule: At most TWO families: one display, one body. No third font, ever.

spacing._rule: 8pt grid. Every margin/padding is a multiple of 4. Never eyeball.

touchTargets_pt._rule: Apple floor 44; senior/kid go 56-64. Sub-44 ~3x error rate.

color._rule: Per-app palette. Contrast is fleet-law: body >=4.5:1, large >=3:1. AAA for senior body where feasible.

haptics._rule: @capacitor/haptics. Light impact on primary tap; success/error on outcomes. Never on scroll.

requiredPatterns._rule: These are not optional. Every app implements all five.
requiredPatterns.skeletonLoading: Shape-of-content skeletons, never a bare spinner. Text before images.
requiredPatterns.emptyState: Every list/feed ships a designed zero-state: illustration + one value line + one primary action. (Apple 4.2: never look empty/unfinished.)
requiredPatterns.errorBoundary: Top-level ErrorBoundary with a VISIBLE fallback (skills/boot-gate/templates/ErrorBoundary.tsx). Never a silent white/green screen.
requiredPatterns.splashHide: SplashScreen.hide() in a finally; launchAutoHide:false. Never stuck on splash.
requiredPatterns.offlineGraceful: Network/back-end down -> cached content + a friendly retry, never a dead spinner.

performanceBudget._rule: Defer analytics/ads/heavy init until after first interaction. >2.5s cold start hurts first-session retention.

activation._rule: Reach the aha before any signup/permission/paywall. Prime permissions with a contextual soft-ask AFTER a value moment.

ahaByApp.fourvault: first card scanned into the vault
